name: Crunchy Fish Fillets
recipeIngredient: 2 tsp. Spike Seasoning (may use Lemon Pepper)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees.
2. Combine yogurt, egg whites, and seasoning.
3. Thoroughly coat each fillet with this mixture, pressing it in well.
4. Dip the coated fillets in bread crumbs, pressing the crumbs into the fish.
5. Place the fillets in a shallow baking pan sprayed with nonstick spray (PAM).
6. Bake at 450 degrees for about 10 minutes, or until brown on top and crispy.
